flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Flathead Valley Community College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (23.5% → 17.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Flathead Valley Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (50.4% → 63.2%).
